column1: # coverage.tsv — read frontier for progressive deepening (AGENT + scan share it). TAB-separated.
# One row per document or tight group. Columns:
#   path        raw/-relative path the row covers (e.g. shared-drive/Finance/Tax/YE2023/T5) — used for freshness
#   value       high | med | low   (owner priorities in notes.md first, then a type heuristic)
#   pass        pass number it was last read in (0 = not yet)
#   fingerprint content fingerprint at last read — managed by `scan --refresh`; set to - when you (re)read
# Ownership: the agent owns path/value/status/pass/last_read/notes; `scan --refresh` owns the
# fingerprint column and flips read->stale when a doc changes since it was read. The frontier
# the deepen pass works is (unread ∪ stale), value-ordered.
